products.title: Nike Air Max 270
products.description: The Nike Air Max 270 delivers visible cushioning under every step with a large Air unit in the heel — the biggest in Nike running history. A breathable mesh upper and foam midsole keep things lightweight, while the wide heel cradle provides stability. Perfect for all-day wear and casual street style.

products.title: Adidas Stan Smith
products.description: A timeless tennis-inspired silhouette that has transcended sport and become a global style icon. The Stan Smith features a clean full-grain leather upper, perforated three-stripe detailing on the sides, and a cupsole construction for all-day comfort. Available in classic white with green heel tab.

products.title: Converse Chuck Taylor All Star
products.description: The Chuck Taylor All Star is the world's most iconic sneaker — a canvas high-top that's been a cultural staple since 1917. Featuring a durable canvas upper, medial eyelet for added ventilation, and the classic ankle patch. Pairs effortlessly with jeans, chinos, or anything in between.

products.title: New Balance 574
products.description: The New Balance 574 is a retro-running icon reborn for everyday comfort. Built with a durable suede and mesh upper, ENCAP midsole technology provides support and cushioning while the rubber outsole delivers traction on any terrain. A go-to for heritage style that never goes out of fashion.

products.title: Vans Old Skool
products.description: The Vans Old Skool was the first shoe to feature the iconic Vans side stripe — and it's been a skate and street staple ever since. The durable canvas and suede upper, padded collar, and waffle outsole make it as functional as it is stylish. A must-have for any sneaker collection.

products.title: Nike React Infinity Run Flyknit
products.description: Designed to keep you running, the Nike React Infinity Run is built to help reduce injury and keep you on the road. More foam and improved upper details provide a secure and cushioned feel. The wide, rounded sole shape creates a smooth ride from heel to toe so you can keep running longer.

products.title: Adidas Ultraboost 22
products.description: The Ultraboost 22 is built for runners who want performance and style in one package. BOOST midsole technology delivers incredible energy return with every stride, while the Primeknit+ upper adapts to the natural expansion of the foot during a run. Continental rubber outsole ensures reliable grip on any surface.

products.title: Brooks Ghost 15
products.description: The Brooks Ghost 15 is a trusted daily trainer built for neutral runners who want a smooth, balanced ride. Soft cushioning underfoot via DNA Loft v2 foam provides a plush yet responsive feel. The engineered air mesh upper offers a breathable and secure fit from first mile to last.

products.title: ASICS Gel-Nimbus 25
products.description: The ASICS Gel-Nimbus 25 delivers exceptional comfort for long-distance runners. PureGEL technology absorbs impact in the heel for a softer landing, while the FF BLAST PLUS ECO midsole foam provides excellent energy return. The jacquard mesh upper creates a streamlined fit with targeted support zones.

products.title: Timberland 6-Inch Premium Waterproof Boot
products.description: The iconic Timberland boot, crafted with premium full-grain waterproof leather and sealed seams to keep your feet dry in any weather. The padded collar adds comfort while the lug outsole delivers traction on rugged terrain. A boot built to last a lifetime — and look good doing it.

products.title: Dr. Martens 1460 Original 8-Eye Boot
products.description: Since 1960, the Dr. Martens 1460 has been a symbol of counterculture and individual style. Made from smooth Smooth leather with the signature air-cushioned sole, AirWair heel loop, yellow welt stitching, and grooved sides. This is the original boot that started it all — durable, iconic, and endlessly versatile.

products.title: Thursday Boot Co. Captain Chelsea Boot
products.description: The Captain Chelsea Boot from Thursday Boot Co. is handcrafted from full-grain leather with a sleek, minimalist silhouette. Featuring a rubber outsole for all-day wear, elastic side panels for easy on-and-off, and genuine leather lining that molds to your foot over time. Business or weekend — this boot does both.

products.title: Birkenstock Arizona Soft Footbed
products.description: The Birkenstock Arizona is the quintessential two-strap sandal — instantly recognizable and beloved worldwide. The contoured cork-latex footbed molds to the shape of your foot over time, providing customized arch support and deep heel cup. The soft footbed variant adds an extra layer of suede cushioning for supreme comfort.

products.title: Teva Original Universal Sandal
products.description: Born on the Colorado River in 1984, the Teva Original Universal is the adventure sandal that started it all. The universal strapping system provides a custom fit for all foot shapes, while the Spider rubber outsole grips wet and dry surfaces with confidence. Waterproof, packable, and built for wherever the day takes you.

products.title: Reef Cushion Bounce Phantom
products.description: The Reef Cushion Bounce Phantom combines style with serious comfort technology. The recycled PET webbing upper sits atop a SWELLULAR cushion technology midsole that delivers responsive rebound with every step. Vegan-friendly construction and a grippy rubber outsole make this the ultimate summer sandal for beach to bar.
